meta.title: Model Prism Enterprise — Advanced AI Gateway for Teams | ohara.systems
meta.description: Model Prism Enterprise unlocks multi-tenant management, custom routing categories, LDAP/SSO, budget controls, advanced routing, and priority support. Self-hosted, air-gapped ready.

hero.description: Everything in the free edition — plus multi-tenant management, custom routing categories, LDAP/SSO, budget controls, and dedicated support. Built for teams running AI at scale.

comparison.title: Free vs. Enterprise
comparison.subtitle: Everything you need to compare — no sales call required.

deepDive.title: Built for Enterprise AI Operations
deepDive.subtitle: Model Prism Enterprise gives your platform team full control over how AI is used across the entire organization.

items.title: Multi-Tenant Management
items.description: Create and manage unlimited tenants — each with isolated API keys, model access, and usage quotas. Ideal for teams, departments, or customers.

items.title: Custom Routing Categories
items.description: Define your own task categories and map them to the right models. Add preset profiles, benchmark routing accuracy, and optimize for cost vs. quality.

items.title: Self-Optimizing Benchmark Agent
items.description: The built-in Benchmark Agent continuously analyzes routing decisions against real outcomes. It adjusts token thresholds, keyword rules, category tiers, and model priorities — with mandatory dry-run simulation before every change. Set it up once, and routing quality improves automatically.

items.title: LDAP / SSO Integration
items.description: Connect Active Directory or any LDAP server. Automatically sync users, enforce group-based access policies, and eliminate manual user management.

items.title: Resilience & Auto-Failover
items.description: Configure provider fallback chains per tenant. When AWS Bedrock goes down, requests automatically fail over to Azure OpenAI. The built-in circuit breaker detects failing providers in real time and temporarily removes them from rotation. Context overflow? Model Prism auto-upgrades to a larger-context model or truncates the conversation — zero manual intervention required.

items.title: Budget Limits & Alerts
items.description: Set hard or soft spending caps per tenant. Receive alerts when budgets approach their limit, and automatically throttle or block tenants.

items.title: Priority Support
items.description: Dedicated email address with a 24h response SLA. Direct access to the engineering team for escalations, migrations, and integration assistance.

items.title: Backlog Prioritization
items.description: Enterprise customers can directly influence the Model Prism roadmap. Vote on features, request custom integrations, and get them shipped faster.

items.title: Privacy by Default
items.description: All prompt logging is disabled by default — no user data is captured unless explicitly enabled by an admin. When enabled, prompt content is stored AES-256-GCM encrypted in the database. Unique user tracking uses anonymized IP hashes (SHA-256), never raw IPs. You stay in full control of what is logged and for how long.

licensing.title: Flexible Licensing
licensing.description: Enterprise licenses are delivered as offline keys — no telemetry, no internet connection required. Fully deployable in air-gapped environments. License validation is performed locally using asymmetric cryptography. We always find the cheapest license for you: savings-based or a fixed fee, whichever is lower. We believe in the value we deliver — so we only win when you do.

options.title: Offline Key
options.description: Sign and verify locally. Works without network access. No phoning home.

options.title: License Server
options.description: Connect to license.ohara.systems for managed key distribution and renewal.

options.title: Custom Agreement
options.description: Volume licenses, perpetual licenses, and custom terms available for larger teams.

bottomCta.title: Ready to scale?
bottomCta.description: Tell us about your setup — we'll send you an enterprise quote within one business day.
